div1.entryFree: Lapwing, the bird Vanellus, alias peewit: 'tis my familiar sin with maids to seem the l. and to jest, tongue far from heart, Meas. I, 4, 32*; cf. far from her nest the l. cries away, Err. IV, 2, 27. Beatrice like a l. runs close by the ground, Ado III, 1, 24. this l. runs away with the shell on his head, Hml. V, 2, 193.
